name: Spaghetti Squash Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped onion, cooked chicken, condensed cream of chicken soup, and sour cream (or plain yogurt) in a large bowl.
2. Add the chopped pimentos and shredded carrots to the mixture.
3. Stir in the cooked spaghetti squash until well combined.
4. In a separate small bowl, mix the herb-seasoned stuffing cubes with melted butter.
5. Fold the stuffed mixture into the main dish.
6. Transfer everything into a 2-quart casserole dish.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
